label.coffee.sensory_text: Bright and silky. Notes of caramel, blackberries and chocolate.
label.coffee.producer_text: Origin: Huila, Colombia; Process: Washed; Varieties: Colombia; Altitude: 1850 masl; Roast: Whole bean coffee roasted for filter; Jhonathan Gasca; Produced together with; 9,9 USD/KG; The price we've chosen to pay for the coffee based on quality; A fruity, silky Colombia lot by Jhonathan Gasca. The Gasca family are fourth-generation coffee farmers. They have focused on quality coffees during their time in charge of the farm.
